How Health Score is Calculated

  • Overdue Tasks (30%): 100 if no overdue tasks, 0 if any overdue tasks exist
  • Last Activity (20%): 100 if ≤7 days, 50 if 8-14 days, 0 if >14 days
  • Close Date (25%): 100 if >30 days away, 50 if 15-30 days, 0 if <15 days
  • Stage Aging (25%): 100 if ≤30 days, 50 if 31-60 days, 0 if >60 days

Risk Levels: On Track (75-100), Needs Attention (50-74), At-Risk (0-49)
